summary: Added profile --robot-triage, profile capabilities --json, and profile robot-docs guide while preserving the nested doctor namespace.
Added hidden profile doctor --fix and profile doctor fix safe refusals that exit 2 and name read-only alternatives.
Updated machine-readable and prose contracts to include the new top-level agent surfaces and release version.
Wrapped profile --json --robot-triage in the unified profile.v0 envelope while keeping non-json --robot-triage as direct machine JSON.
